response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video from 00:00 to 03:24. 2. Identified the title as 'The Rise of the Nut Warrior' from on-screen text. 3. Evaluated all audio segments; found that the music is purely instrumental throughout. 4. Concluded there is no vocal music, therefore no lyrics to retrieve.
response.global_summary: A video titled 'The Rise of the Nut Warrior' featuring a sequence of panning shots through a burning village, entirely accompanied by instrumental music.

scenes.description: Introductory sequence showing the title 'The Rise of the Nut Warrior' followed by shots of a village being destroyed by fire. Accompanied by instrumental background music.
